title: Miniature 3D Travel Souvenir Badge Poster AI
sourceTitle: Miniature 3D Travel Souvenir Badge Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium travel poster featuring miniature souvenir badge containing a Kyoto hillside temple diorama and a traveler viewpoint. Subject: miniature souvenir badge containing a Kyoto hillside temple diorama and a traveler viewpoint is the floating miniature 3D souvenir badge hero, with sculpted edges, handcrafted resin enamel texture, intricate diorama details, traveler viewpoint, realistic architecture, and luxury collectible magnet presence. Scene: clean matte background with original-style travel photo guide panel beneath the badge provides the clean matte poster environment, guide-photo strip or reference-scene panel beneath the badge, soft shadows, and premium tourism layout spacing. Composition: Fixed sophisticated vertical travel-poster layout: floating badge centered above, miniature diorama inside the badge, clean matte background, elegant destination typography below, integrated travel-photo guide panel under the badge, and generous editorial negative space. Signature Elements: Floating sculpted badge, miniature diorama travel scene, tiny traveler viewpoint, resin enamel edge, integrated guide-photo strip, clean matte background, elegant serif destination title, and premium tourism postcard finish. Style: Ultra-realistic 3D render, luxury collectible souvenir badge, handcrafted resin enamel texture, premium tourism branding, sophisticated editorial layout, luxury postcard aesthetic, photorealistic materials, shallow depth of field, and high-end travel campaign finish. Color Palette: Muted destination-matched palette with matte background color, realistic architecture tones, resin enamel highlights, soft shadow neutrals, elegant serif type, and refined postcard contrast. Lighting: Soft ambient product lighting with subtle badge shadow, enamel edge highlights, miniature diorama depth, realistic atmospheric lighting inside the scene, and clean premium poster clarity. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: KYOTO / JAPAN appears as elegant serif destination typography: destination in large capitals with country beneath or beside it, cleanly aligned below the badge. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
